name: Name
home-desc: Official website of Employment News, providing latest government job highlights, announcements, and career articles in India.
home-keywords: employment news, rojgar samachar, government jobs, career news, latest job vacancies
about-desc: Learn about Employment News, the premier journal for government job opportunities in India since 1976.
about-keywords: about employment news, mission, vision, publications division, ministry of i&b
contact-desc: Contact Employment News for support, queries about subscriptions, or advertisements. Reach out via phone or email.
contact-keywords: contact employment news, help desk, subscription support, grievance, help phone
rti-desc: Access Right to Information (RTI) details for Employment News. Learn about your rights and transparency.
rti-keywords: RTI, right to information, transparency, employment news RTI, legal info
announcements-desc: Latest announcements and notifications from Employment News. Stay informed about recruitment details.
announcements-keywords: announcements, notifications, updates, recruitment news, govt notices
archive-desc: Browse past editions of Employment News. Search and access previous job highlights and articles.
archive-keywords: employment news archive, previous issues, past job news, government jobs archive
sitemap-desc: Navigate through all sections of the Employment News website easily using our sitemap.
sitemap-keywords: sitemap, site map, navigation, employment news navigation
grievance-desc: Submit your grievances or feedback to Employment News. We value your input to improve our services.
grievance-keywords: grievance form, feedback, submit grievance, customer support, help
sales-points-desc: Find official sales points and distributors for physical copies of Employment News across India.
sales-points-keywords: sales points, distributors, buy employment news, retail outlets
advertisement-desc: Get information about placing advertisements in Employment News and reach a wide audience of job seekers.
advertisement-keywords: advertisements, place ad, recruitment ads, business ads, marketing
screen-reader-desc: Information about screen reader access for visual impairment. Assistive technologies support details.
screen-reader-keywords: accessibility, screen reader, JAWS, NVDA, inclusive web
editorial-desc: Read career guidance, success stories, and specialized articles from the experts at Employment News.
editorial-keywords: editorial, career guidance, success stories, job tips, expert advice
subscription-desc: Subscribe to e-version or print version of Employment News for regular updates on job opportunities.
subscription-keywords: subscribe, e-version, print newspaper, job magazine, membership
privacy-desc: Learn about how Employment News protects your personal information and ensures data privacy.
privacy-keywords: privacy policy, data protection, personal info, security
hyperlink-desc: Policies regarding linking to external websites and how other websites can link to Employment News.
hyperlink-keywords: hyperlinking policy, external links, website linking
copyright-desc: Information about reproduction of material from Employment News website and copyright ownership.
copyright-keywords: copyright policy, material reproduction, legal info
terms-desc: Terms and conditions for using the Employment News portal and legal disclaimers.
terms-keywords: terms and conditions, user agreement, disclaimer
cmap-desc: Content Management and Archival Policy (CMAP) for Employment News portal.
cmap-keywords: CMAP, content management, archival policy, GIGW
wim-desc: Information about the Web Information Manager responsible for maintaining the Employment News portal.
security-desc: Official Security Policy for the Employment News portal.
security-keywords: security policy, data protection, website audit
wim-keywords: web information manager, contact person, portal maintenance
help-desc: Find help and guidance on using the Employment News portal and its various features.
feedback-desc: Provide your valuable feedback and suggestions to help us improve the Employment News portal.
archival-desc: Archival Policy for Employment News records.
review-desc: Review Policy for Employment News content review.
